TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ke-lye-ke-al.MU-TE-AL "Gregor Johann Mendel, 1822 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a dimiad" Aw-ti-li-ti-kow sen-u sye-cya. lecuh i A-ti-li-ti-kow Si-li-si-ya "ayza tungus nu Cye-ke" Hay-ing-ce-bu-taw a niyazu' i Pu-lung "Brunn" "ayza Cye-keay a Pu-al-nu" a siw-taw-yen mala sinpu, mililiday minanam tu nu saayaway a tademaw, u kasenengan ayzaay a ziday nu mililiday gingkiw a wama. maawas tu pigingkiw tu hulintaw, maazih tu ku liliday gingkiw tulu ku angangan masilucan tusa, pasasumad malaliyas masiluc atu pahyanyan mapulung a masiluc. kauzipan na tademaw 1822 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a demiad, ci Mung-te-al lecuh IiAw-ti-li-ti-kow Si-li-su-ya "ayza tuntu nu Cye-ke" Hay-ing-ce-taw-bu a niyazu'ay pakutucay anu malukay a luma', wama atu wina hatu mutesekay nu palumaay "baki u palumaay a kuli". Mung-te-al wawa henay hawsa malilid nu migingkiway paluma atu migingkiway tu kalu a tineng, sakay mulangaway mulangaw atu mamutelak aku balu tada manamuh. 1822ŚĻī7śúą20śó•, . 1840 a mihcaan maseking niza micumud tu Aw-al-mi-ce talakaway a cacudadan ce-sye-yen, u ku-tyen-sye ku cudaden, nika minanam henay ciniza tu su-sye. 1843 a mihcaan zayhan pakuyuc ku luma' caay tu picudada, lecad a mihcaan 10 a bulad 21 ku mihcaan ni Mung-te-al-micumud tu Pu-lung-cen-Aw-ku-s-tin syu-taw-yen, i tizaay a kiwkay palekal tu cacay cung-sye pasubana' tu cudad,pasubana' tu ce-lan ke-sye. 1840 . sabalucu' sa ciniza mi lasul tu sapasubana' tu cudad, sadimel sa pasubana' cudad, sisa kanamuhan nu micudaday. nika i 1850 a mihcaan kala saydan tu pisekingan, zayhan u-li-sye atu ti-ce-sye a tineng caay kayadah, Mung-te-al patayzaen nu kiwkay i Wi-ye-na talakaway a cacudadan tesek a minanam, kacacayat atu kibisien a ke-sye pasubana' atu miecaw, makaliliday nu matinengay nu ke-sye-cya amin. . 1856 a mihcaan, makay Wi-ye-na talakaway a cacudadan caay ka tenes tayza i Pu-lu-en, Mung-te-al malingatu katayana' katukuh 8 a mihcaan migingkiw tu hulintaw. Mung-te-al saayaway makay yadahay a sapaluma a patiyamay natiza miala tu 34 a lamangan ku sapaluma tu hulintaw, makayza mipili' sapigingki tu 22 a lamangan a sapaluma. taneng kuheni pasasuzuma, mahiniay tanayaay a lamit atu apuyu'ay a lami', kimulmulay cancaay sa u makulibutay, abuabua a pudac ancaay selengacay a punacan. Mung-te-al maawas ku nu tademaw a nipahaba paluma uyni a hulintaw, sakay cayay kalecad ziday a hulintaw a waway atu kayadah mikawaw sadimel miazih, miasip atu mipudac. mikawaw tu mahiniay migingkiway misadungdung atu pihaymaw miazih. manamuh ciniza tu uzipay a pigingkiw a kawaw, sawsawni tayza miazihay nu labang paseneng sa musakamu, "uyni yamin hatu nu tataynaan a wawa! ci Mung-te-al malingatu mikawaw migingkiw tu hulintaw hawsa, ci Ta-al-wen kikasumad nasawnina tahkal. hapinang sa ciniza miasip migingkiw tu nisulitan ni Ta-al-wen makay mihedup yadahay a kasiiyuan. masuped katukuh ayza i tuudan ni Ta-al-wen, pinaay a cudadan ku nisulitan ni Ta-al-wen, pabaw izaw henay ku nisulitan ni Mung-te-al, mahapinang ciniza tu sakay ci Ta-al-wen atu misametek tu misulitay. . saayaway, ci Mung-te-al pigingkiw tu hulintaw caay kasibalucu' amiazih tu mililiday masilic a mikawaw. Saayaway a balucu' niza u maydihay a pakala tu kapahay a sapaluma, uyza i pigingkiwan, hamaw sa pasayza nipitahawan tu mililiday masilic. caay ku hulitaw dada', ci Mung-te-almihiya henay tu zumaay nu mulangaway yadah ku misengiay a pigingkiw, zuma pasu kubkub, ce-low-lan atu ce-mu-li, pawacay tu maazihay niza tu mililiday masilic sakay hatu mulangaway u tatungusay amin. ŤĶ∑ŚąĚ, . makay cilekay a kasahiza atu waywayan caay kadayum mitapal a maazih ku mililiday masilic, makay teked waywayan madayum matapal, uyni ke-syean katenes nipabaliw a lalekalan. ci Mung-te-al caay ku mikinsaay tu cilekay amin, sangaleb panutek teked wayway nu cilekay, uyni ciniza atu nababalaki migingkiway tu cilekay kahenulan a kasazuma. ci Mung-te-al mipili' tu sagingkiwan a zaylyaw u matada ke-syeay tu, zayhan u hulinta tungusay u mauentin ku sapaluma teked uzipay papalu a mulangaway, madayum a palumaen, madayum u laliwasak ku asipen, uyni sakay maazih niza ku mililiday masilic pawapen tu kapahay a kawaw. kabalakian tu ni Mung-te-al napalatatenga' tu kapahay a cabey niza, ci Pu-lu-en talakaway nalimaan syen ta-ti-ce-lyang sye cyaw-su ci Ni-ye-say-al sakamu sa , "azihen, tayni tu ku ziday aku sa. uyni a kamu mala u kahemekan palaayaway a kamu. katukuh kapatayan ni Mung-te-al zikuz tu 16 a mihcaan, hulintaw nigingkiwan tu nisulitan tatengaay patahkal zikuz tu 34 a mihcaan, makay mikawaw ciniza tu pitanam migingkiw tu hulintaw zikuz tu 43 a mihcaan, nipaliayaw a kamu malatatengaay tu. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == k…ô-r~…ĺj…ô-k…ô-ar~…ĺ.mu-t…ô-ar~…ĺ "gr…ôgor *ońßann m…ônd…ôr~…ĺ, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad" aw-ti-r~…ĺi-ti-kow s…ôn-u sj…ô- ¶ja. r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i a-ti-r~…ĺi-ti-kow si-r~…ĺi-si-ja "ajza tuŇčus nu ¶j…ô-k…ô" ńßaj-iŇč- ¶…ô-bu-taw a nijazu Ē~ ° i pu-r~…ĺuŇč "brunn" "ajza ¶j…ô-k…ôaj a pu-ar~…ĺ-nu" a siw-taw-j…ôn mar~…ĺa sinpu, mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj minanam tu nu saajawaj a tad…ômaw, u kas…ôn…ôŇčan ajzaaj a zidaj nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj giŇčkiw a wama. maawas tu pigiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw, maazińß tu ku r~…ĺir~…ĺidaj giŇčkiw tur~…ĺu ku aŇčaŇčan masir~…ĺu ¶an tusa, pasasumad mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas masir~…ĺu ¶ atu pańßjanjan mapur~…ĺuŇč a masir~…ĺu ¶. kauzipan na tad…ômaw **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß iiaw-ti-r~…ĺi-ti-kow si-r~…ĺi-su-ja "ajza tuntu nu ¶j…ô-k…ô" ńßaj-iŇč- ¶…ô-taw-bu a nijazu Ē~ °aj pakutu ¶aj anu mar~…ĺukaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, wama atu wina ńßatu mut…ôs…ôkaj nu par~…ĺumaaj "baki u par~…ĺumaaj a kur~…ĺi". muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ wawa ńß…ônaj ńßawsa mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu migiŇčkiwaj par~…ĺuma atu migiŇčkiwaj tu kar~…ĺu a tin…ôŇč, sakaj mur~…ĺaŇčawaj mur~…ĺaŇčaw atu mamut…ôr~…ĺak aku bar~…ĺu tada manamuńß. **********, . **** a mińß ¶aan mas…ôkiŇč niza mi ¶umud tu aw-ar~…ĺ-mi- ¶…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶…ô-sj…ô-j…ôn, u ku-tj…ôn-sj…ô ku ¶udad…ôn, nika minanam ńß…ônaj ¶iniza tu su-sj…ô. **** a mińß ¶aan zajńßan pakuju ¶ ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶aaj tu pi ¶udada, r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** ku mińß ¶aan ni muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ-mi ¶umud tu pu-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶…ôn-aw-ku-s-tin sju-taw-j…ôn, i tizaaj a kiwkaj par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶aj ¶uŇč-sj…ô pasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad,pasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶…ô-r~…ĺan k…ô-sj…ô. **** . sabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sa ¶iniza mi r~…ĺasur~…ĺ tu sapasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad, sadim…ôr~…ĺ sa pasubana Ē~ ° ¶udad, sisa kanamuńßan nu mi ¶udadaj. nika i **** a mińß ¶aan kar~…ĺa sajdan tu pis…ôkiŇčan, zajńßan u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô atu ti- ¶…ô-sj…ô a tin…ôŇč ¶aaj kajadańß, muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ patajza…ôn nu kiwkaj i wi-j…ô-na tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan t…ôs…ôk a minanam, ka ¶a ¶ajat atu kibisi…ôn a k…ô-sj…ô pasubana Ē~ ° atu mi…ô ¶aw, makar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu matin…ôŇčaj nu k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja amin. . **** a mińß ¶aan, makaj wi-j…ô-na tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs tajza i pu-r~…ĺu-…ôn, muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu katajana Ē~ ° katukuńß * a mińß ¶aan migiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw. muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ saajawaj makaj jadańßaj a sapar~…ĺuma a patijamaj natiza miar~…ĺa tu ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku sapar~…ĺuma tu ńßur~…ĺintaw, makajza mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° sapigiŇčki tu ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan a sapar~…ĺuma. tan…ôŇč kuńß…ôni pasasuzuma, mańßiniaj tanajaaj a r~…ĺamit atu apuju Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °, kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj ¶an ¶aaj sa u makur~…ĺibutaj, abuabua a puda ¶ an ¶aaj s…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a puna ¶an. muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ maawas ku nu tad…ômaw a nipańßaba par~…ĺuma ujni a ńßur~…ĺintaw, sakaj ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad zidaj a ńßur~…ĺintaw a wawaj atu kajadańß mikawaw sadim…ôr~…ĺ miazińß, miasip atu mipuda ¶. mikawaw tu mańßiniaj migiŇčkiwaj misaduŇčduŇč atu pińßajmaw miazińß. manamuńß ¶iniza tu uzipaj a pigiŇčkiw a kawaw, sawsawni tajza miazińßaj nu r~…ĺabaŇč pas…ôn…ôŇč sa musakamu, "ujni jamin ńßatu nu tatajnaan a wawa! ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikawaw migiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw ńßawsa, ¶i ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn kikasumad nasawnina tańßkar~…ĺ. ńßapinaŇč sa ¶iniza miasip migiŇčkiw tu nisur~…ĺitan ni ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn makaj mińß…ôdup jadańßaj a kasiijuan. masup…ôd katukuńß ajza i tuudan ni ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, pinaaj a ¶udadan ku nisur~…ĺitan ni ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, pabaw izaw ńß…ônaj ku nisur~…ĺitan ni muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ, mańßapinaŇč ¶iniza tu sakaj ¶i ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn atu misam…ôt…ôk tu misur~…ĺitaj. . saajawaj, ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ pigiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw ¶aaj kasibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° amiazińß tu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶ a mikawaw. saajawaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° niza u majdińßaj a pakar~…ĺa tu kapańßaj a sapar~…ĺuma, ujza i pigiŇčkiwan, ńßamaw sa pasajza nipitańßawan tu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶. ¶aaj ku ńßur~…ĺitaw dada Ē~ °, ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺmińßija ńß…ônaj tu zumaaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj jadańß ku mis…ôŇčiaj a pigiŇčkiw, zuma pasu kubkub, ¶…ô-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺan atu ¶…ô-mu-r~…ĺi, pawa ¶aj tu maazińßaj niza tu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶ sakaj ńßatu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj u tatuŇčusaj amin. **, . makaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj a kasańßiza atu wajwajan ¶aaj kadajum mitapar~…ĺ a maazińß ku mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶, makaj t…ôk…ôd wajwajan madajum matapar~…ĺ, ujni k…ô-sj…ôan kat…ôn…ôs nipabar~…ĺiw a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ ¶aaj ku mikinsaaj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj amin, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb panut…ôk t…ôk…ôd wajwaj nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, ujni ¶iniza atu nababar~…ĺaki migiŇčkiwaj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kasazuma. ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu sagiŇčkiwan a zajr~…ĺjaw u matada k…ô-sj…ôaj tu, zajńßan u ńßur~…ĺinta tuŇčusaj u mau…ôntin ku sapar~…ĺuma t…ôk…ôd uzipaj papar~…ĺu a mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, madajum a par~…ĺuma…ôn, madajum u r~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak ku asip…ôn, ujni sakaj maazińß niza ku mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶ pawap…ôn tu kapańßaj a kawaw. kabar~…ĺakian tu ni muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ napar~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu kapańßaj a ¶ab…ô niza, ¶i pu-r~…ĺu-…ôn tar~…ĺakawaj nar~…ĺimaan sj…ôn ta-ti- ¶…ô-r~…ĺjaŇč sj…ô ¶jaw-su ¶i ni-j…ô-saj-ar~…ĺ sakamu sa , "azińß…ôn, tajni tu ku zidaj aku sa. ujni a kamu mar~…ĺa u kańß…ôm…ôkan par~…ĺaajawaj a kamu. katukuńß kapatajan ni muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ zikuz tu ** a mińß ¶aan, ńßur~…ĺintaw nigiŇčkiwan tu nisur~…ĺitan tat…ôŇčaaj patańßkar~…ĺ zikuz tu ** a mińß ¶aan, makaj mikawaw ¶iniza tu pitanam migiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw zikuz tu ** a mińß ¶aan, nipar~…ĺiajaw a kamu mar~…ĺatat…ôŇčaaj tu. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ke-lye-ke-al.MU-TE-AL "Gregor Johann Mendel, 1822 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a dimiad" Aw-ti-li-ti-kow sen-u sye-cya. lecuh i A-ti-li-ti-kow Si-li-si-ya "ayza tungus nu Cye-ke" Hay-ing-ce-bu-taw a niyazu' i Pu-lung "Brunn" "ayza Cye-keay a Pu-al-nu" a siw-taw-yen mala sinpu, mililiday minanam tu nu saayaway a tademaw, u kasenengan ayzaay a ziday nu mililiday gingkiw a wama. maawas tu pigingkiw tu hulintaw, maazih tu ku liliday gingkiw tulu ku angangan masilucan tusa, pasasumad malaliyas masiluc atu pahyanyan mapulung a masiluc. kauzipan na tademaw 1822 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a demiad, ci Mung-te-al lecuh IiAw-ti-li-ti-kow Si-li-su-ya "ayza tuntu nu Cye-ke" Hay-ing-ce-taw-bu a niyazu'ay pakutucay anu malukay a luma', wama atu wina hatu mutesekay nu palumaay "baki u palumaay a kuli". Mung-te-al wawa henay hawsa malilid nu migingkiway paluma atu migingkiway tu kalu a tineng, sakay mulangaway mulangaw atu mamutelak aku balu tada manamuh. 1822ŚĻī7śúą20śó•, . 1840 a mihcaan maseking niza micumud tu Aw-al-mi-ce talakaway a cacudadan ce-sye-yen, u ku-tyen-sye ku cudaden, nika minanam henay ciniza tu su-sye. 1843 a mihcaan zayhan pakuyuc ku luma' caay tu picudada, lecad a mihcaan 10 a bulad 21 ku mihcaan ni Mung-te-al-micumud tu Pu-lung-cen-Aw-ku-s-tin syu-taw-yen, i tizaay a kiwkay palekal tu cacay cung-sye pasubana' tu cudad,pasubana' tu ce-lan ke-sye. 1840 . sabalucu' sa ciniza mi lasul tu sapasubana' tu cudad, sadimel sa pasubana' cudad, sisa kanamuhan nu micudaday. nika i 1850 a mihcaan kala saydan tu pisekingan, zayhan u-li-sye atu ti-ce-sye a tineng caay kayadah, Mung-te-al patayzaen nu kiwkay i Wi-ye-na talakaway a cacudadan tesek a minanam, kacacayat atu kibisien a ke-sye pasubana' atu miecaw, makaliliday nu matinengay nu ke-sye-cya amin. . 1856 a mihcaan, makay Wi-ye-na talakaway a cacudadan caay ka tenes tayza i Pu-lu-en, Mung-te-al malingatu katayana' katukuh 8 a mihcaan migingkiw tu hulintaw. Mung-te-al saayaway makay yadahay a sapaluma a patiyamay natiza miala tu 34 a lamangan ku sapaluma tu hulintaw, makayza mipili' sapigingki tu 22 a lamangan a sapaluma. taneng kuheni pasasuzuma, mahiniay tanayaay a lamit atu apuyu'ay a lami', kimulmulay cancaay sa u makulibutay, abuabua a pudac ancaay selengacay a punacan. Mung-te-al maawas ku nu tademaw a nipahaba paluma uyni a hulintaw, sakay cayay kalecad ziday a hulintaw a waway atu kayadah mikawaw sadimel miazih, miasip atu mipudac. mikawaw tu mahiniay migingkiway misadungdung atu pihaymaw miazih. manamuh ciniza tu uzipay a pigingkiw a kawaw, sawsawni tayza miazihay nu labang paseneng sa musakamu, "uyni yamin hatu nu tataynaan a wawa! ci Mung-te-al malingatu mikawaw migingkiw tu hulintaw hawsa, ci Ta-al-wen kikasumad nasawnina tahkal. hapinang sa ciniza miasip migingkiw tu nisulitan ni Ta-al-wen makay mihedup yadahay a kasiiyuan. masuped katukuh ayza i tuudan ni Ta-al-wen, pinaay a cudadan ku nisulitan ni Ta-al-wen, pabaw izaw henay ku nisulitan ni Mung-te-al, mahapinang ciniza tu sakay ci Ta-al-wen atu misametek tu misulitay. . saayaway, ci Mung-te-al pigingkiw tu hulintaw caay kasibalucu' amiazih tu mililiday masilic a mikawaw. Saayaway a balucu' niza u maydihay a pakala tu kapahay a sapaluma, uyza i pigingkiwan, hamaw sa pasayza nipitahawan tu mililiday masilic. caay ku hulitaw dada', ci Mung-te-almihiya henay tu zumaay nu mulangaway yadah ku misengiay a pigingkiw, zuma pasu kubkub, ce-low-lan atu ce-mu-li, pawacay tu maazihay niza tu mililiday masilic sakay hatu mulangaway u tatungusay amin. ŤĶ∑ŚąĚ, . makay cilekay a kasahiza atu waywayan caay kadayum mitapal a maazih ku mililiday masilic, makay teked waywayan madayum matapal, uyni ke-syean katenes nipabaliw a lalekalan. ci Mung-te-al caay ku mikinsaay tu cilekay amin, sangaleb panutek teked wayway nu cilekay, uyni ciniza atu nababalaki migingkiway tu cilekay kahenulan a kasazuma. ci Mung-te-al mipili' tu sagingkiwan a zaylyaw u matada ke-syeay tu, zayhan u hulinta tungusay u mauentin ku sapaluma teked uzipay papalu a mulangaway, madayum a palumaen, madayum u laliwasak ku asipen, uyni sakay maazih niza ku mililiday masilic pawapen tu kapahay a kawaw. kabalakian tu ni Mung-te-al napalatatenga' tu kapahay a cabey niza, ci Pu-lu-en talakaway nalimaan syen ta-ti-ce-lyang sye cyaw-su ci Ni-ye-say-al sakamu sa , "azihen, tayni tu ku ziday aku sa. uyni a kamu mala u kahemekan palaayaway a kamu. katukuh kapatayan ni Mung-te-al zikuz tu 16 a mihcaan, hulintaw nigingkiwan tu nisulitan tatengaay patahkal zikuz tu 34 a mihcaan, makay mikawaw ciniza tu pitanam migingkiw tu hulintaw zikuz tu 43 a mihcaan, nipaliayaw a kamu malatatengaay tu. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

a-ti-r~…ĺi-ti-kow si-r~…ĺi-si-ja "ajza tuŇčus nu ¶j…ô-k…ô" ńßaj-iŇč- ¶…ô-bu-taw a nijazu Ē~ ° i pu-r~…ĺuŇč "brunn" "ajza ¶j…ô-k…ôaj a pu-ar~…ĺ-nu" a siw-taw-j…ôn mar~…ĺa sinpu, mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj minanam tu nu saajawaj a tad…ômaw, u kas…ôn…ôŇčan ajzaaj a zidaj nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj giŇčkiw a wama. maawas tu pigiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw, maazińß tu ku r~…ĺir~…ĺidaj giŇčkiw tur~…ĺu ku aŇčaŇčan masir~…ĺu ¶an tusa, pasasumad mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas masir~…ĺu ¶ atu pańßjanjan mapur~…ĺuŇč a masir~…ĺu ¶. kauzipan na tad…ômaw **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß iiaw-ti-r~…ĺi-ti-kow si-r~…ĺi-su-ja "ajza tuntu nu ¶j…ô-k…ô" ńßaj-iŇč- ¶…ô-taw-bu a nijazu Ē~ °aj pakutu ¶aj anu mar~…ĺukaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, wama atu wina ńßatu mut…ôs…ôkaj nu par~…ĺumaaj "baki u par~…ĺumaaj a kur~…ĺi". muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ wawa ńß…ônaj ńßawsa mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu migiŇčkiwaj par~…ĺuma atu migiŇčkiwaj tu kar~…ĺu a tin…ôŇč, sakaj mur~…ĺaŇčawaj mur~…ĺaŇčaw atu mamut…ôr~…ĺak aku bar~…ĺu tada manamuńß. **********, . **** a mińß ¶aan mas…ôkiŇč niza mi ¶umud tu aw-ar~…ĺ-mi- ¶…ô tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶…ô-sj…ô-j…ôn, u ku-tj…ôn-sj…ô ku ¶udad…ôn, nika minanam ńß…ônaj ¶iniza tu su-sj…ô. **** a mińß ¶aan zajńßan pakuju ¶ ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶aaj tu pi ¶udada, r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** ku mińß ¶aan ni muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ-mi ¶umud tu pu-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶…ôn-aw-ku-s-tin sju-taw-j…ôn, i tizaaj a kiwkaj par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶aj ¶uŇč-sj…ô pasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad,pasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶…ô-r~…ĺan k…ô-sj…ô. **** . sabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sa ¶iniza mi r~…ĺasur~…ĺ tu sapasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad, sadim…ôr~…ĺ sa pasubana Ē~ ° ¶udad, sisa kanamuńßan nu mi ¶udadaj. nika i **** a mińß ¶aan kar~…ĺa sajdan tu pis…ôkiŇčan, zajńßan u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô atu ti- ¶…ô-sj…ô a tin…ôŇč ¶aaj kajadańß, muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ patajza…ôn nu kiwkaj i wi-j…ô-na tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan t…ôs…ôk a minanam, ka ¶a ¶ajat atu kibisi…ôn a k…ô-sj…ô pasubana Ē~ ° atu mi…ô ¶aw, makar~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu matin…ôŇčaj nu k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja amin. . **** a mińß ¶aan, makaj wi-j…ô-na tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs tajza i pu-r~…ĺu-…ôn, muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu katajana Ē~ ° katukuńß * a mińß ¶aan migiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw. muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ saajawaj makaj jadańßaj a sapar~…ĺuma a patijamaj natiza miar~…ĺa tu ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan ku sapar~…ĺuma tu ńßur~…ĺintaw, makajza mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° sapigiŇčki tu ** a r~…ĺamaŇčan a sapar~…ĺuma. tan…ôŇč kuńß…ôni pasasuzuma, mańßiniaj tanajaaj a r~…ĺamit atu apuju Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °, kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj ¶an ¶aaj sa u makur~…ĺibutaj, abuabua a puda ¶ an ¶aaj s…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a puna ¶an. muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ maawas ku nu tad…ômaw a nipańßaba par~…ĺuma ujni a ńßur~…ĺintaw, sakaj ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad zidaj a ńßur~…ĺintaw a wawaj atu kajadańß mikawaw sadim…ôr~…ĺ miazińß, miasip atu mipuda ¶. mikawaw tu mańßiniaj migiŇčkiwaj misaduŇčduŇč atu pińßajmaw miazińß. manamuńß ¶iniza tu uzipaj a pigiŇčkiw a kawaw, sawsawni tajza miazińßaj nu r~…ĺabaŇč pas…ôn…ôŇč sa musakamu, "ujni jamin ńßatu nu tatajnaan a wawa! ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikawaw migiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw ńßawsa, ¶i ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn kikasumad nasawnina tańßkar~…ĺ. ńßapinaŇč sa ¶iniza miasip migiŇčkiw tu nisur~…ĺitan ni ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn makaj mińß…ôdup jadańßaj a kasiijuan. masup…ôd katukuńß ajza i tuudan ni ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, pinaaj a ¶udadan ku nisur~…ĺitan ni ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn, pabaw izaw ńß…ônaj ku nisur~…ĺitan ni muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ, mańßapinaŇč ¶iniza tu sakaj ¶i ta-ar~…ĺ-w…ôn atu misam…ôt…ôk tu misur~…ĺitaj. . saajawaj, ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ pigiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw ¶aaj kasibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° amiazińß tu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶ a mikawaw. saajawaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° niza u majdińßaj a pakar~…ĺa tu kapańßaj a sapar~…ĺuma, ujza i pigiŇčkiwan, ńßamaw sa pasajza nipitańßawan tu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶. ¶aaj ku ńßur~…ĺitaw dada Ē~ °, ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺmińßija ńß…ônaj tu zumaaj nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj jadańß ku mis…ôŇčiaj a pigiŇčkiw, zuma pasu kubkub, ¶…ô-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺan atu ¶…ô-mu-r~…ĺi, pawa ¶aj tu maazińßaj niza tu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶ sakaj ńßatu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj u tatuŇčusaj amin. **, . makaj ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj a kasańßiza atu wajwajan ¶aaj kadajum mitapar~…ĺ a maazińß ku mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶, makaj t…ôk…ôd wajwajan madajum matapar~…ĺ, ujni k…ô-sj…ôan kat…ôn…ôs nipabar~…ĺiw a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ ¶aaj ku mikinsaaj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj amin, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb panut…ôk t…ôk…ôd wajwaj nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, ujni ¶iniza atu nababar~…ĺaki migiŇčkiwaj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kasazuma. ¶i muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu sagiŇčkiwan a zajr~…ĺjaw u matada k…ô-sj…ôaj tu, zajńßan u ńßur~…ĺinta tuŇčusaj u mau…ôntin ku sapar~…ĺuma t…ôk…ôd uzipaj papar~…ĺu a mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, madajum a par~…ĺuma…ôn, madajum u r~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak ku asip…ôn, ujni sakaj maazińß niza ku mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj masir~…ĺi ¶ pawap…ôn tu kapańßaj a kawaw. kabar~…ĺakian tu ni muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ napar~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu kapańßaj a ¶ab…ô niza, ¶i pu-r~…ĺu-…ôn tar~…ĺakawaj nar~…ĺimaan sj…ôn ta-ti- ¶…ô-r~…ĺjaŇč sj…ô ¶jaw-su ¶i ni-j…ô-saj-ar~…ĺ sakamu sa , "azińß…ôn, tajni tu ku zidaj aku sa. ujni a kamu mar~…ĺa u kańß…ôm…ôkan par~…ĺaajawaj a kamu. katukuńß kapatajan ni muŇč-t…ô-ar~…ĺ zikuz tu ** a mińß ¶aan, ńßur~…ĺintaw nigiŇčkiwan tu nisur~…ĺitan tat…ôŇčaaj patańßkar~…ĺ zikuz tu ** a mińß ¶aan, makaj mikawaw ¶iniza tu pitanam migiŇčkiw tu ńßur~…ĺintaw zikuz tu ** a mińß ¶aan, nipar~…ĺiajaw a kamu mar~…ĺatat…ôŇčaaj tu. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
